name: Naji Table Lamp - 24.5 Inch Height - TBL4258 - Blue Grey - Safavieh
description: Elevate your home decor with the Naji 25 inch ceramic table lamp. This exquisite piece in a calming blue grey hue offers a sophisticated touch to any room. The lamp features a ceramic body finished with precision, complemented by an iron neck that adds a modern twist to its classic form. With a balanced composition of 80 percent ceramic and 20 percent iron, Naji stands as an elegant example of craftsmanship. Whether placed in the living room, bedroom, or office, this lamp provides a warm glow that invites relaxation and style. Its sleek design ensures a seamless blend with various interiors, offering a versatile addition to your space. Let the Naji table lamp illuminate your surroundings with a touch of elegance and simplicity.
